description_long: A hamburger sits on a white, octagonal plate accompanied by several crinkle-cut French fries. The hamburger features a glossy, golden-brown top bun sprinkled with sesame seeds, and a visible layer of green lettuce peeking out from beneath the bun. The patty and a slice of cheese are partially visible, with the cheese slightly melted and extending beyond the edge of the patty. The fries are arranged around the burger, some leaning against the bun and others lying flat on the plate. The plate itself rests on a square, light-colored platform, giving the presentation a clean and organized appearance. The overall look is appetizing and typical of a classic fast-food meal.
description: A sesame seed hamburger with lettuce, cheese, and a patty sits on a white plate with crinkle-cut fries, all presented on a light platform.
description_view_0: The hamburger is seen from the front with the top bun, lettuce, and a few fries clearly visible on the plate.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the side of the burger, showing more of the melted cheese and the fries arranged closely around the plate.
description_view_2: The back view reveals the lettuce layer and the crinkle-cut fries fanned out around the plate, with the bun's roundness prominent.
description_view_3: From this side, the burger's top bun and lettuce are visible, with fries leaning against the burger and plate edge.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce is layered directly beneath the top bun, with cheese partially melted over the patty and visible at the edges. The toppings are evenly distributed and extend slightly beyond the bun.
